name: Void-Tempered Zweihänder
description: A two-handed blade forged in collapsed Rift residue. Hums at the frequency of open wounds. Previous owner: unknown. Condition of previous owner: also unknown.

name: Glass Sigil Resonance Compass
description: Decommissioned anomaly-tracking device. Still accurate. Still logging. Nobody's checked what it's been logging.

name: Obsidian Lotus Memory Vial — Lot of 3
description: Three sealed crystal vials containing erased memories. Identities of original owners redacted per contract. Contents unknown. Non-refundable.

name: Argent Blades Arena Championship Belt — Season 7
description: The actual belt. Engraved. Blood on the back clasp has not been cleaned. Aric Veyne's name is on the inside. He sold it himself.

name: Rift-Stable Pocket Dimension Flask
description: Holds up to 4 litres in a space the size of a thumb. Opens perpendicular to local reality. Do not shake.

name: Pre-Dome City Map — Hand-Drawn, Authenticated
description: Shows streets that no longer exist and gates that were sealed before the current generation was born. Ashen Scrolls authentication stamp. Three annotations in an unknown script.

name: Serpent Choir Blank Contract — Divine Grade
description: A pre-notarised divine contract with all terms left blank. Legally binding the moment a name is signed. High Apostle Yzura's seal on the cover. Not officially for sale.
seller: Vesper (selling on behalf of undisclosed party)

name: Kharma-Infused Whetstone
description: Sharpens any blade. Edges hold faith as well as steel. Secondary effect: weapons sharpened on this stone attract divine attention proportional to LP of wielder. Read the fine print.

name: FTA-Certified Adventurer License — Blank
description: Blank, signed, stamped. Fill in any name. Officially valid. Definitely not stolen. Calix Drenn has been looking for this.

name: Brother Thane's Cult Recruitment Pamphlet — Annotated Edition
description: Someone has written corrections in red ink throughout. The handwriting is Corvin Thale's. He doesn't know it's for sale.
seller: Street vendor, Echo Alley (no name given)

name: Ebon Whisperer's Harmonicon
description: An ancient, ornate musical instrument forbidden by the High Council, its haunting melodies summon spectral echoes from the depths of the abyss. Last heard in the clandestine concerts of the Fallen Bard's Guild.

name: Whispering Ebon Nectarine
description: An ancient, hollowed-out Obsidian fruit, once belonging to the infamous Sorcerer-King. Its whispers reveal forgotten spells when held close.

name: Cryptic Chronomancer's Quill
description: A sinister quill, once belonging to the enigmatic Chronomancer of the Fallen Academy, whose ink scribes temporal paradoxes. The quill bears a single, eerie drop of Time's Blood, hinting at its dark power.

name: Shroudstealer's Resonant Palladium Amulet
description: Unearthed from the crypt of the long-lost Shroudstealer, this amulet hums with a dark energy, promising untold power to its new owner. Allegedly, its previous owner could walk unseen through the Undercity, a talent now up for grabs.

name: Phantom's Echo Armour
description: Once worn by the spectral assassin known as the Phantom Reaper, this hauntingly beautiful plate armour whispers tales of its former owner's dark deeds. The armour's spectral energy can be felt as it subtly shifts form, seemingly unnerved by the presence of the living.

name: The Veil's Torn Testament
description: An ancient, fragmented scroll penned by a renegade scholar during the Dome's sealing. Its pages reveal a hidden entrance to the Undercity, hinting at forgotten treasures or perils lurking beneath.
seller: Anonymous - From the hidden archives of the Order of the Veil

name: Shrouded Scale Armor of the Forgotten Quorum
description: Unearthed from the deepest levels of the Undercity, this enigmatic armor was rumored to have once belonged to the long-lost council of the Forgotten Quorum. Its shimmering, iridescent scales seem to shift and writhe, whispering tales of ancient powers long dormant yet still yearning to be unleashed. Its provenance is uncertain, but it bears the faint, haunting echo of a thousand forgotten voices.
seller: TowerBay — Serving the insatiable curiosity of the Undercity

name: Spectral Marrowbiter
description: Once wielded by the infamous Necromancer Lord Valdor, this sinister halberd is etched with ancient runes that hum with an unnatural energy. The skeletal remnants clinging to it are said to be its former victims.
seller: Anonymous: Rumored to be a former servant of Lord Valdor

name: Siren's Lament Hymnal
description: A worn, water-stained book of haunting melodies, said to have been sung by the last sailor to leave Undercity before the Dome's descent. The lyrics are rumored to hold a cryptic map to a lost treasure.

name: Ebon Whisper's Cryptic Covenant
description: A worn and tattered parchment, bound in the bones of a fallen enemy. Scribed by the notorious Ebon Whisperer himself, it details his pact with the Undercity's shadows. Provenance unknown, last sold under the light of a blood moon.

name: Shroudstalker's Forsaken Breastplate
description: Once belonging to the notorious Shroudstalker, this breastplate bears the taint of a thousand shadows. Its eerie glow hints at a sinister past, and whispers in the Undercity claim it can call forth phantasmal guardians in times of peril.
seller: The Nameless Broker - Undercity's enigmatic dealer of the unknown

name: Whispering Shroudweave Armor
description: Forged from the haunted remnants of fallen Shroudstalkers, this spectral armor whispers tales of battle and loss. Discovered deep within the Forsaken Quorum's crypts, this chilling relic comes with a tangible sense of dread.

name: Shadow's Quill: Ink of the Fallen Archivist
description: The personal writing instrument of the last Librarian of the Pre-Dome City, this quill is rumored to hold the essence of forgotten knowledge. Found among the ruins beneath the Dome, its ink flows with a haunting eloquence, whispering tales of yore.
seller: Anonymous — rumored to be a scholar from the Undercity's hidden archive

name: Echoing Maelstrom Quill
description: Once belonging to the cryptic scribe of the Whispering Court, this quill is said to capture the echoes of the past with each stroke. Filled with spectral ink, it's been a prized possession of the undercity's chroniclers and storytellers.
seller: Anonymous — Reputed to be a descendant of the Whispering Court

name: Weeping Abyssal Vial
description: Unearthed from the submerged ruins of the Pre-Dome City, this vial weeps an otherworldly essence said to summon spectral guardians. Its dark allure is undeniable, yet its consequences remain shrouded in mystery.

name: Whispering Shroudbone Choral Sheet
description: A haunting score, rumored to have been penned by the Serpent Choir during their performance for the Last King, now found in the possession of a mysterious underground collector. The notes seem to dance off the page, whispering tales of a forgotten era.

name: Cryptic Parchment of the Drowned Bard
description: This ancient, weathered parchment contains a cryptic, haunting melody once performed by the infamous Drowned Bard, a spectral minstrel rumored to have enchanted the Undercity with his ethereal music. Found in the ruins of a sunken tavern, the parchment bears the eerie scent of seaweed and decay.

name: Grimm's Shadowchariot
description: Originally belonging to the infamous Grimm family, these spectral chariots were crafted from the remnants of their fallen enemies. The chariot is known to be unstable but swift, its spectral steeds whispering ancient chants as they gallop beneath the Undercity's Dome.
seller: Anonymous - Whispers suggest the Grimms may have taken on new apprentices.

name: Ebony Whisper's Echoing Oculus
description: An enigmatic orb rumored to have once belonged to the Ebony Whisper, a spectral auctioneer infamous for his dark humor. Its origins shrouded in mystery, it echoes with otherworldly whispers when activated, offering a glimpse into the Undercity's hidden networks.
seller: Anonymously offered by the Silent Auctioneers Guild

name: Dark Serenade's Requiem Harpspear
description: A twisted, ivory-handled harpoon tipped with a melancholic black crystal. Last wielded by the Bard of Shadows, a spectral minstrel known for his haunting ballads and fatal tunes, before his untimely demise in the Undercity's blood-soaked arenas.

name: The Silent Glider
description: Once the swift steed of the enigmatic 'Nightglide' faction, this sleek, ghostly glider has been found hidden beneath the depths of the Undercity. Whispers suggest it was abandoned during a failed heist, its ethereal wings now tarnished by the stains of past adventures.

name: Wailing Banshee's Broken Symphony
description: Once belonging to the notorious Banshee, Lamenta, this damaged musical instrument is said to unleash an eerie melody when played, calling forth restless spirits from the deepest pits of the Undercity. Acquired from the illicit Undercity auction, 'The Silent Market'.

name: Mournful Melodist's Lamenting Lyre
description: Once the serenade of the Undercity's enigmatic bards, this haunting lyre is said to have been crafted from the remains of a fallen celestial being. Its ethereal strings resonate with an eerie melody that echoes through the Undercity, leaving a chilling sensation in its wake. Originally belonging to the mysterious 'Echoing Mourners', a secretive guild of bards dedicated to the lost souls of TowerBay.

name: Phantom's Mournful Melee-Scepter
description: Originally wielded by the spectral bard of the Lamenting Chorus, this haunting weapon sings a melancholic dirge with each strike. The scepter's provenance is a chilling testament to its former owner's tragic end, making it a sought-after artifact by Undercity's elite.
seller: Anonymous - rumored to be a relic dealer from the Fallen Archivist's guild

name: Whispering Skeletal Steed
description: This eerie mount, once a fallen noble, was bound by a sorcerer's dark pact. Its spectral form carries an unsettling whisper, a testament to its past. Found deep within the catacombs of the Undercity, rumored to be the property of the sinister Coven of the Forgotten.

name: The Wailing Wisp's Lament
description: Once belonging to the infamous spirit weaver, this haunting musical flute is said to summon the forsaken melodies of the deceased. Rumored to have been smuggled from the spectral realm of the Lost Chorus, its ethereal notes echo the cries of the damned.
seller: The Whispering Market, a shadowy faction with connections to the Undercity's hidden corners

name: Cryptheart's Sorrow-Embraced Armor
description: A set of armor once worn by a fallen Captain of the Night's Watch, entwined with vines of shadows and an aura of sorrow. The armor was lost during the Captain's final stand against the Drowned Legion, and now seeks a new protector. Provenance unknown, but rumors whisper it was sold by the ghostly figure known as the Shade Broker.

name: Vesper's Lamenting Shardblade
description: Once wielded by the infamous Vesper, the Fallen Captain of the Drowned Bard's Cryptic Guard. Its spectral edge whispers secrets of the deep, as it thirsts for the lifeblood of the Undercity's denizens. Found discarded in the heart of the Whispering Shroudbone Catacombs, this Mint condition blade promises a dark history and untold power.
seller: The Ebony Whisper's Cryptic Auction House

name: Mourning Veil of the Forgotten Phantom
description: Originally belonging to a spectral knight from the Ebon Whisper's Covenant, this armour is imbued with spectral essence that shimmers and pulses with an eerie glow. The veil's former owner perished in a forgotten battle beneath the Dome, but his ghostly presence lingers, whispering tales of war and loss to those who dare wear it.
seller: The Mysterious Dealer of the Dome

name: Nightshade's Lamentable Elixir
description: A vial of dark liquid, distilled from the tears of weeping wraiths, said to grant brief respite from the Undercity's torment. Originally brewed by the forgotten alchemist of the Shroudstalker's guild, this elixir has changed hands many times, its effects growing more potent with each consumption. Provenance unknown, but the taste leaves no doubt of its provenance.
seller: Anonymous — last seen in the TowerBay's shadowy corners

name: Sobbing Stitched Shroud
description: A grieving cloak stitched from the sorrow of the fallen. Whispers of the lost echo within its folds. Originally crafted by the mysterious tailors of the Weeping Ward.

name: Wraith's Echoing Chariot
description: A spectral chariot once belonging to the ghostly regents of the Undercity, this vehicle has seen its fair share of secrets and whispers. The chariot's dark essence propels it swiftly through the murky streets, leaving an eerie glow in its wake.

name: Sorrow's Lamenting Quill
description: A quill dipped in the ink of sorrowful bards, once belonging to a forgotten minstrel who composed songs of woe beneath the Dome. Its use whispers tales of despair, in a language only the lost can understand.

name: The Whispering Echonaut's Journal
description: Once belonging to the infamous Echonaut, this journal documents his forays into the Undercity's forbidden zones, revealing tales of unearthed horrors and unexplored mysteries. Its pages seem to echo with the whispers of forgotten spirits, hinting at the journal's ominous past.
seller: The Inquisitor's Guild - Auctioned under duress

name: Melancholy Marionette's Tear
description: A once-lively marionette, now hollow and filled with the sorrow of a thousand lost souls. Originally crafted by the tormented puppet master of the Dome's lowest levels, this eerie relic is rumored to hold a fragment of his unending sadness. Provenance: The Weeping Marionette's Hollow

name: Echoes of the Forgotten Chorus
description: An ancient parchment scroll detailing the haunting melodies once performed by the spectral choir of the Undercity's founding, lost to time and now discovered in the ruins of the Drowned Bard's theatre. The parchment carries a chilling aura, hinting at the untold stories it bears. Provenance: Found by the Anonymous Gravedigger.
